prompt: A photorealistic, slightly angled snapshot of a green classroom chalkboard. On the left side of the board is a large, meticulously drawn chalk illustration of the {argument name="company name" default="OpenAI"} logo, rendered in blended pastel colors like green, blue, and purple, with the word "{argument name="logo text" default="OpenAI"}" written in neat white chalk beneath it. The right side of the board features handwritten text organized into exactly 3 numbered sections. Section 1 is titled "{argument name="section one title" default="1. OpenAI란?"}" followed by a brief explanatory paragraph. Section 2 is titled "{argument name="section two title" default="2. 주요 제품"}" and lists 3 bullet points including ChatGPT, DALL-E, and Codex. Section 3 is titled "{argument name="section three title" default="3. 특징"}" and contains 3 bullet points describing features. The chalkboard has a silver metal frame and a chalk ledge holding 2 rectangular erasers and scattered pieces of chalk. Below the board is an off-white wall with a double electrical outlet. In the bottom left foreground, the top edge of a dark laptop screen is partially visible, and above the chalkboard, the bottom edge of a framed sign is cut off by the frame.
translatedPrompt: 一张照片级逼真、略带角度的教室绿板快照。黑板左侧是一幅精心绘制的粉笔画，展示了 {argument name="company name" default="OpenAI"} 的标志，采用绿色、蓝色和紫色等混合柔和色彩渲染，下方用整洁的白色粉笔写着“{argument name="logo text" default="OpenAI"}”。黑板右侧是组织成 3 个编号部分的手写文本。第 1 部分标题为“{argument name="section one title" default="1. OpenAI란?"}”，后跟一段简短的说明性文字。第 2 部分标题为“{argument name="section two title" default="2. 주요 제품"}”，列出了 3 个要点，包括 ChatGPT、DALL-E 和 Codex。第 3 部分标题为“{argument name="section three title" default="3. 특징"}”，包含 3 个描述特征的要点。黑板配有银色金属边框，粉笔槽上放着 2 块长方形黑板擦和零散的粉笔。黑板下方是灰白色的墙壁，上面有一个双孔电源插座。在左下角前景中，可以看到深色笔记本电脑屏幕的顶部边缘，黑板上方，一个带框标志的底部边缘被画面截断。

breakdown.creativeCore: 教室黑板课程：生成一张照片级逼真的教室黑板图像，上面绘有彩色标志和结构化的手写课程笔记。
breakdown.subject: 文字符号
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；文字是主视觉
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
